summary: Common non-executing engineering clauses for Depone agent-team lane receipts.

clauses.text: Keep planned work and executed work separate; do not present an unrun step as done.
clauses.validation_note: Receipts must record concrete command or evidence facts instead of intent-only claims.

clauses.text: Treat artifacts, hashes, transcripts, and source files as the source of truth.
clauses.validation_note: Receipts must include hashes for committed evidence they reference.

clauses.text: Local shell evidence does not raise assurance or claim container isolation.
clauses.validation_note: Boundary fields must keep raises_assurance false and avoid A2/container claims.

clauses.text: Depone command and verification surfaces remain Python standard-library only.
clauses.validation_note: Contract validation must not require third-party packages.

clauses.text: Missing or invalid contract and role bindings fail before emitting a passing receipt.
clauses.validation_note: Launch commands must reject unknown V22 role ids and malformed contract JSON.
